entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br., the crop studied for yield heterosis

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The weight of the grain produced by the plant

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: The weight of the vegetative part of the plant excluding the grain

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total biological mass of the plant

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total biomass

entities.name: HETEROSIS
entities.description: The superior performance of hybrids compared to their parents

entities.name: BIOMASS HETEROSIS
entities.description: Heterosis specifically observed for total biomass

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD HETEROSIS
entities.description: Heterosis specifically observed for grain yield

entities.name: STOVER YIELD HETEROSIS
entities.description: Heterosis specifically observed for stover yield

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX HETEROSIS
entities.description: Heterosis specifically observed for the harvest index

entities.name: TESTCROSSES
entities.description: The process of crossing specific populations to evaluate genetic traits

entities.name: ARID ZONE
entities.description: Environment characterized by low rainfall and water scarcity

entities.name: NORTHWEST INDIA
entities.description: The geographical region where the experiments were conducted

entities.name: SINGLE CROSS HYBRIDS
entities.description: Hybrids resulting from a single cross between two parental lines

entities.name: RESTORER POPULATIONS
entities.description: Populations used to restore fertility in male-sterile lines

entities.name: MALE-STERILE LINES
entities.description: Lines that cannot produce functional pollen

relationships.description: positive HI heterosis results in negative stover yield heterosis
